title: Mystery Of Mask
description: Mystery Of Mask contains a lot of new items, mobs and blocks, which can diversify your game experience.
body:
Mystery Of Mask is Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.4 thar adds some items, mob and small amount fo blocks. Unfortunatly for now there is no any special biom or dimension with new items. But the mod is still in development, and there will be major updates soon.

This mod specializes in the theme of the moon and sun that make up my character. The mod adds items such as new ore generated in End, Mysterious Mask which give the effect of darkness and Harlequin staff. If you use Harlequin staff on mob it will be transformed in pig or chicken or sheep.

All of the progress you can see on my [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@aesper_)
Any additional questions can be answered on the [Discord channel](https://discord.gg/QeHbYaTeHd)

This mod can be launch only on the sever side of Minecraft. 

## Credits:
Creators:

- _ZarCreator: artist and co-creator 
##
